content.text:
Done. Summary:

### Validation
Local `./scripts/validate.sh` passed (format, ruff, mypy, 650 unit tests).

### Commits pushed
1. **`8678e68`** — `refactor(domain-driven): consolidate prompts and streamline design routing`
   - Design-reviewer Langfuse prompts, coder `design_path`, removed blocked PR revise path, dropped evidence artifacts and one-off Langfuse upload scripts
2. **`994f0dd`** — `fix(domain-driven): address Greptile review nits`
   - Removed dead `_parse_json_message`, simplified coder prompt mode type

### PR babysit — [PR #219](https://github.com/trilogy-group/ab-agno/pull/219)
| Check | Status |
|---|---|
| lint | pass |
| type | pass |
| test-unit | pass |
| conventional-pr-title | pass (PR title updated) |
| Semgrep | pass |
| Merge conflicts | none (`MERGEABLE`, `CLEAN`) |

### Greptile — remaining (not CI-blocking)
Three architectural items from the Greptile review are still open and align with known legacy DI debt in `AGENTS.md`:

1. **`design_router.py`** — `os.environ` fallback for `GITHUB_TOKEN` outside composition root
2. **`design_router.py`** — duplicate GitHub API call for `.rebaseai/config.yaml`
3. **`domain_driven_workflow.py`** — `DomainDrivenRunner.from_env()` inside service functions

Fixed in this pass: dead code (#4) and redundant type union (#5).

PR is **green and mergeable** from a CI standpoint. Say if you want those three DI items tackled in a follow-up commit.
